CustomField.description: Auto-generated by the Household Naming Service using the Formal Greeting format configured in Household Settings. Combines salutation, first, and last names of non-excluded household member Contacts.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: A formal greeting for this household (e.g., 'Mr. and Mrs. John and Jane Smith'). Generated automatically from household member names.
CustomField.label: Formal Greeting
